action.description:
Introduced by Senators Smith, Hesselbein, Ratcliff, Roys, L. Johnson, Larson, Dassler-Alfheim and Spreitzer; 
cosponsored by Representatives Doyle, Moore Omokunde, Tenorio, Arney, Bare, Udell, DeSmidt, Subeck, Joers, Madison, Sinicki, Neubauer, Stroud, Palmeri, Sheehan, Vining, Fitzgerald and Anderson
